description: Stylish, updated roman sandals for the ultra-fashionable! Style these for colour blocking or accessorise with tonal metallic pieces. Upper Synthetic leather straps with sequin embellishments running across the midfoot to the forefoot Synthetic leather heel cup with a zipper closure Fabric lined footbed with brand name Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
